Function# notify_get_state

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOSvisionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
extern uint32_t notify_get_state(int token, uint64_t *state64);
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_get_state#parameters)

`token`(Input) notification token

`state64`(Output) 64-bit unsigned integer value

## [Return Value](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_get_state#return-value)

Returns status.

## [Discussion](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_get_state#Discussion)

Get the 64-bit integer state value.
